name: skills_list
description: List all installed skills showing SKILL.md, tools.json, allowlist.json, and execution.json population status and tool count.

name: skills_read
description: Read a skill's SKILL.md, tools.json, allowlist.json, or execution.json file content.

file.description: File to read: 'skill_md' for SKILL.md, 'tools_json' for tools.json, 'allowlist_json' for allowlist.json, 'execution_json' for execution.json

name: skills_validate
description: Validate a skill's tool descriptor files for schema conformance and cross-file consistency. Reports errors (must fix) and warnings (should review).

name: skills_dry_run
description: Preview what a tool call would execute without running the command. Shows the argv mapping, sandbox validation, deny pattern checks, stdin content, temp files, and post-processing pipeline. Use this to verify execution.json and allowlist.json mapping is correct. With --simulated-output, also previews postProcess, hintConditions, and truncation on the provided output.

args.description: Tool call arguments as JSON (e.g. '{"message": "feat: add feature"}')

simulated_output.description: Simulated command output for post-execution pipeline preview (postProcess, hintConditions, truncation). Omit to skip the post-processing preview.
